customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals present. Customer called in proactively after receiving a text, was cooperative throughout, and signed off warmly. Low-resistance entry for Joel.
unresolved_concerns: No context was provided to the customer about what Joel's conversation will cover — customer may not know whether this is a service check, a sales call, or something else.
Customer was driving at time of transfer — unknown whether they are still driving when Joel picks up, which affects Joel's ability to run a full qualification or closer conversation.
sensitive_topics_raised: Customer disclosed they were driving at the time of the call — Joel should confirm the customer is in a safe position to talk before proceeding.
exact_promises_rep_made: Rep framed the outreach as 'an annual checkup just to make sure everything's working the way it's supposed to' — Joel should be aware this is the customer's expectation for the conversation.
closer_should_know: Customer entered warm and exited warm — goodwill is intact. However, the 'annual checkup' framing set by the routing rep means the customer may expect a service/maintenance conversation rather than a sales or qualification call. Joel should acknowledge the checkup framing before pivoting to whatever the actual purpose of the outreach is, or the customer will feel the bait-and-switch immediately.
